name: wj-gh
description: End-to-end GitHub change workflow — branch, PR, CI/review-bot monitoring, merge

interface.shortDescription: Drive a change from branch to merged PR.
interface.longDescription: End-to-end GitHub workflow: scope, branch, commit with tests, open a PR, watch CI, respond to a code-review bot, fix mechanical failures, and merge. Provider-agnostic; treats CodeRabbit as an optional integration.
